name: Claude Code Pipeline
//: The universal:2 image ships with Node 20+, Python 3.11+, git, and most common dev tools pre-installed. Big image (~5GB) but zero setup time per Codespace and zero risk of missing tools at pre-flight.
postCreateCommand: pip install --user uv && ~/.local/bin/uv tool install pytest && ~/.local/bin/uv tool install mypy && ~/.local/bin/uv tool install ruff && echo 'Dev environment ready. Open Claude Code (left sidebar) and run /business-intake or /orchestrator.'
